Localization.Description: Aggregation of events with id "PT_Cisco_ASA_FWSM_PIX_syslog_405001_Received_ARP_request_response_collision": from 4th up to 100th within 5 minutes

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: Aggregated event. {event_src.host}: ARP packet received with {src.host}/{src.mac} information different from ARP Cache
